name: Viper
description: You've failed the acid test. Viper, the Netherdrake The malevolent familiar of a sadistic wizard who captured and hoped to tame him, Viper was curiously glad to have been sprung from the sealed and unchanging subterranean Nether Reaches where his race had lived for millions of years, after tectonic slippage had sealed off the Netherdrakes in luminous caverns. Viper spent some time appearing to submit to the wizard's enchainments, hoping to learn what he could of the dark magics the mage practiced. But he soon realized that few spells were as deadly as the toxins that were his birthright. Exuding an acid that swiftly ate away the bars of his cage, the Netherdrake slipped free of his confines, spit poison in the old spellcaster's eyes, and soared out to let the world know that it had a new master.

abilities.name: Predator
abilities.description: Attacks apply an additional physical spell damage instance based on the target's current health and Viper's level. Health Loss Factor: 0.15 (0.5). Factor Increase per Hero Level: 0.05.

abilities.name: Poison Attack
abilities.description: Intensifies Viper's venom, adding an effect to his normal attack that applies a stacking movement speed slow and magic resistance reduction while dealing damage over time. Now applies armor reduction per stack with its debuff affecting buildings. The damage per second component is less effective on buildings. Increases max stacks. Cast Range: 600. Damage per Second per Stack: 4/8/12/16 (60/120/180/240). Move Speed Slow per Stack: 3%/6%/9%/12% (45%/90%/135%/180%). Magic Resist Reduction per Stack: 4%/6%/8%/10%. Debuff Duration: 4. Armor Reduction per Stack: (1). Mana Cost: 20.

abilities.name: Nethertoxin
abilities.description: The effect radius increases within fixed intervals over the entire duration. Cast Range: 900. Effect Radius: 400. Damage Interval: 0.5. Min Damage per Instance: 7.5/12.5/17.5/22.5 (7.75/12.75/17.75/22.75). Max Damage per Instance: 17.5/32.5/47.5/62.5 (17.75/32.75/47.75/62.75). Attack Speed Slow: 30/40/50/60. Mana Cost: 14.

abilities.name: Corrosive Skin
abilities.description: Increases Viper's magic resistance. Applies a more noxious Corrosive Skin that further slows enemy units' attack speed that damages Viper within proximity. Radius: 1400. Damage per Second: 10/15/20/25 (25/30/35/40). Attack Speed Slow: 9/18/27/36. Duration: 4. Magic Resist Bonus: 10%/15%/20%/25%. Proximity Radius: (500).

abilities.name: Nosedive
abilities.description: It was thought that Netherdrake wings touch ground only in death, but some surmise that those who've witnessed more intentional landings merely haven't survived to tell the tale. Cast Range: 700. Effect Radius: 500. Damage per Second: 10/15/20/25 (25/30/35/40). Attack Speed Slow: 36/72/108/144. Debuff Duration: 4. Mana Cost: 20.

abilities.name: Viper Strike
abilities.description: Breaks the targeted enemy unit's passive abilities, slows its movement speed and attack speed, while dealing damage over time. The slowing effect reduces incrementally over the duration of the ability. Cast Range: 700/800/900. Damage per Second: 70/100/150 (140/170/220). Move Speed Slow: 60%/70%/80%. Attack Speed Slow: 100/140/180. Break Duration: 6 (7). Debuff Duration: 6 (7). Cooldown: 50/40/30. Mana Cost: 100/150/200.
